response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong individual contributor with 20+ years of software development experience and genuine exposure to developer tooling (CI/CD setup, test frameworks, MCP code generators), but the role is fundamentally a people management position and the resume contains zero evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading organizational change. Staff-level IC titles and workshop facilitation do not substitute for the 2+ years of people management the role requires as a minimum. Without that foundational criterion met, advancing to interview would be premature regardless of his technical depth.
strengths: Extensive breadth across languages, platforms, and system types (web, mobile, embedded, infra) spanning 20 years
Demonstrable developer tooling experience: CI/CD infrastructure at Altom, test runner and assertion libraries for D, MCP code generators and agentic frameworks at Google
Track record of knowledge-sharing and community engagement through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No people management experience anywhere in the resume — no mention of direct reports, hiring, performance feedback, or headcount responsibility
Developer tooling work is incidental to IC delivery roles rather than a sustained 3-year focus area as the JD requires
No evidence of driving organizational change, setting team-level priorities, or owning a multi-quarter technical roadmap
